capability.description: Show logical active peer agents and their execution cwd in the current workspace before editing files.
Cancel an agent session in the current workspace.
Get provider-specific model and reasoning options without starting an agent session. Claude Code may spin up a hidden live discovery session.
Get compact agent session context in the current workspace.
Request desktop AgentGUI activation for an existing agent session.
List enabled Agent Targets and whether tuttid can start their local runtime command.

capability.summary: Send input to an agent session
capability.description: Send user input to an existing agent session. Use --guidance to guide the currently active turn without attaching to output.

guidance.description: Send this prompt as guidance to the currently active turn instead of starting a new turn.

image.description: Image file to attach to this prompt. May be passed multiple times.

capability.description: Get compact session context and recent messages for agent-session mentions.

after-version.description: Return messages after this message version.

before-version.description: Return messages before this message version when order is desc.

limit.description: Maximum number of recent messages to return.

capability.description: List agent sessions in the current workspace. JSON output returns compact session summaries.

capability.summary: Start an agent session with a provider shortcut
capability.description: Start an agent session by canonical provider id. Tutti resolves the provider through the enabled Agent Target catalog.

image.description: Image file to attach to the initial prompt. May be passed multiple times.

capability.description: Get image resources from a specific agent session turn. JSON output keeps images grouped by source user message.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages from the turn to inspect.

turn-id.description: Turn id whose resources should be returned.

capability.description: Get a dynamically rendered Tutti skill bundle for an external agent runtime.

capability.summary: Wait for an agent session stop point
capability.description: Block until the session reaches a stop point. Use `agent session-summary` for context recovery.

after-version.description: Wait for a stop point after this message version.

timeout-ms.description: Maximum time to wait in milliseconds before returning a timeout result.

capability.summary: Start a Claude Code agent session
capability.description: Start a Claude Code agent session in the current workspace. Use --show to request AgentGUI activation.

image.description: Image file to attach to the initial prompt. May be passed multiple times.

source.cliDescription: Start a Claude Code agent session in the current workspace. Use --show to request AgentGUI activation.

capability.description: Start a Codex agent session in the current workspace. Use --show to request AgentGUI activation.

image.description: Image file to attach to the initial prompt. May be passed multiple times.

source.cliDescription: Start a Codex agent session in the current workspace. Use --show to request AgentGUI activation.

capability.description: Start a Tutti Agent session in the current workspace. Use --show to request AgentGUI activation.

image.description: Image file to attach to the initial prompt. May be passed multiple times.

source.cliDescription: Start a Tutti Agent session in the current workspace. Use --show to request AgentGUI activation.

capability.description: Click the element with the given uid (from `tutti browser snapshot`).
Run a JS function on the current page, e.g. "() => document.title", and return its result.
Type a value into the element with the given uid (from `tutti browser snapshot`).
List the open pages/tabs in the workspace browser.

capability.summary: Navigate the browser to a URL
capability.description: Open a URL in the workspace browser and return the page state.

capability.summary: Take a screenshot of the page
capability.description: Save a PNG screenshot of the current page to a file and return its path. Pass full-page=true for the whole page.

capability.summary: Capture an accessibility snapshot of the page
capability.description: Return a text snapshot (accessibility tree) of the current page, including element uids to click/fill.
Left-click at the given (x, y) screen coordinates.
Double-click at the given (x, y) screen coordinates.
Move the mouse cursor to the given (x, y) screen coordinates without clicking.

capability.summary: Press a key or keyboard shortcut
capability.description: Press a key or shortcut, e.g. "cmd+c", "return", "escape".
Right-click at the given (x, y) screen coordinates.

capability.summary: Take a screenshot of the macOS desktop
capability.description: Capture the current screen, save it as a PNG file, and return its path.
Scroll at the given (x, y) coordinates in the given direction.
Type a string of characters at the current cursor position.
Return a simple diagnostic response from the daemon CLI registry.
Create an issue in a specific workspace topic.

topic-id.description: Required topic id. Use issue topic list to discover workspace topics.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Delete an issue from the current workspace.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Get an issue detail record and its tasks.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: List issue records in one workspace topic. Requires --topic-id; use `issue topic list --json` first when the topic is unknown. JSON output omits issue content bodies.

topic-id.description: Required topic id. Use issue topic list --json to discover workspace topics before listing issues.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Complete an issue-level execution run and attach output metadata. Do not use for breakdown-only work.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Create an execution run for an issue. Do not use for breakdown-only work.

agent-session-id.description: Optional override; defaults to the current AgentGUI session when invoked from an agent runtime.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Create a child task under an issue. Use this to persist task breakdown output without creating a run.

due-at-unix.description: Due time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

task-id.description: Stable task id to create; generated when omitted.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Create multiple child tasks under an issue in the JSON array order. Use this to persist task breakdown output without creating runs.

tasks-json.description: JSON array of task objects with title, optional taskId, content, priority, and dueAtUnix.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Delete a task under an issue.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Get task detail, latest run, recent runs, and latest outputs.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: List tasks under an issue. JSON output omits task content bodies.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Complete an execution run and attach output metadata. Do not use for breakdown-only work.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Create an execution run for an issue task. Do not use for breakdown-only work.

agent-session-id.description: Optional override; defaults to the current AgentGUI session when invoked from an agent runtime.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Get run detail and outputs for an issue task.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: List runs for an issue task.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Update a task under an issue. Breakdown updates should edit task fields without creating or completing runs.

content.description: Replace the task instructions or notes.

due-at-unix.description: Set due time as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Create a workspace issue topic.

topic-id.description: Stable topic id to create; generated when omitted.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Delete an empty non-default issue topic.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: List workspace issue topics. Use a returned topicId when listing or creating issues.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Update a workspace issue topic title, summary, or pin state.

pinned.description: Set whether the topic is pinned.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.description: Update issue title, content, or status.

source.appDescription: Plan, track, and execute workspace task work.

capability.summary: List artifact files behind a workspace-reference mention
capability.description: Resolve a workspace-reference handle (app+group / topic+issue) into a flat list of artifact files.

group-id.description: Optional sub-scope: an app group id when source=app, an issueId when source=task. Empty = whole app / whole topic.

id.description: Top container id: appId when source=app, topicId when source=task.

limit.description: Optional max number of files (default and cap 1000).

capability.description: Launch or activate an installed workspace app. Use --route to pass an origin-root route intent.

param.description: Route parameter in key=value form. May be passed multiple times.

route.description: Origin-root route path. Must start with /.

state-json.description: Optional JSON object passed as route state. Maximum 16KiB.
